paper.abstract_en: The recently observed signatures of superconductivity proximate to a fractional quantum anomalous Hall (FQAH) state in a twisted MoTe$_2$ bilayer has revitalized interest in quantum phases of matter induced by anyon dynamics. Here we show how a panoply of anyon-driven phases associated with doping the lattice ${ν=2/3}$ FQAH state can be realized as competing instabilities of a Fermi surface of charge-$e/3$ "quarks" coupled to a $\mathrm{SU}(3)_{-1}$ Chern-Simons gauge field, which is dual to the more conventional $\mathrm{U}(1)_3$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau theory of quasiholes. For example, a range of electronic superconductors emerge from color superconductivity, under which the Fermi surface experiences a pairing instability mediated by gauge fluctuations. These include SC$\star$ phases -- where superconductivity coexists with topological order -- as well as topological superconductors displaying half-integer chiral central charges when the quarks are weakly paired. One example is a topological superconductor arising from a $p+ip$ "color-valley-locked" pairing mechanism with chiral central charge $c_-=-1/2$. On the other hand, both superconducting and non-Fermi liquid phases can emerge when the quarks form an itinerant ferromagnet, polarizing the Fermi surface to a particular combination of colors. Finally, our framework naturally accommodates the possibility of anyonic bound state formation, allowing access to phases induced by doping anyons of charge $2e/3$ as opposed to $e/3$ within the same model. Our work unifies many earlier proposed anyonic phases as instabilities of a single parent quark metal phase, distilling their emergence into a competition between superconductivity and itinerant color ferromagnetism.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 本文探讨了任意子超导性，涉及分数量子反常霍尔态、Chern-Simons规范场、非费米液体及拓扑超导等凝聚态物理前沿，与全息凝聚态主题高度相关。
decision.title_zh: 任意子超导性中的着色
decision.abstract_zh: 最近在扭曲MoTe$_2$双层中观察到的邻近于分数量子反常霍尔（FQAH）态的超导迹象，重新激发了由任意子动力学诱导的量子物相的兴趣。在这里，我们展示了与晶格${ν=2/3}$ FQAH态掺杂相关的各种任意子驱动相如何能够实现为电荷-$e/3$“夸克”费米面与$\mathrm{SU}(3)_{-1}$ Chern-Simons规范场耦合的竞争不稳定性，该描述对偶于更常规的准空穴$\mathrm{U}(1)_3$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau理论。例如，一系列电子超导体从着色超导中涌现，其中费米面经历了由规范涨落介导的配对不稳定性。这些包括SC$\star$相——超导性与拓扑序共存——以及当夸克弱配对时展示半整数手征中心荷的拓扑超导体。一个例子是由$p+ip$“颜色-谷锁定”配对机制产生的拓扑超导体，手征中心荷$c_-=-1/2$。另一方面，当夸克形成巡游铁磁体，将费米面极化到特定的颜色组合时，超导相和非费米液相都可能出现。最后，我们的框架自然地容纳了任意子束缚态形成的可能性，允许在同一模型中通过掺杂电荷$2e/3$（而不是$e/3$）的任意子来访问相。我们的工作将许多早期提出的任意子相统一为单个母体夸克金属相的不稳定性，将它们涌现提炼为超导性与巡游颜色铁磁性之间的竞争。
